overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a porter character with a large cargo backpack traversing rocky coastal mountain terrain. The character walks through sparse vegetation toward a cliff edge, pauses to overlook a vast ocean vista, then continues along the ridge path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail approaching coastal cliff

agents.ego_description: porter character walking steadily uphill through rocky terrain with heavy cargo backpack

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peaks dominating the background horizon
uneven rocky ground with scattered stones and patches of dirt
low bushes and grass tufts growing between rocks

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a porter walking through a wide-open rocky mountain landscape under a partly cloudy sky. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance while sparse vegetation dots the rugged terrain. The character moves steadily forward toward an approaching cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook with ocean view

events.description: terrain opens to reveal dramatic ocean cliff vista as character reaches the edge
character stops at cliff edge to survey the landscape and ocean below

agents.ego_description: porter stops at cliff edge, turning to look out over the ocean vista and surrounding terrain

entered.detail: vast expanse of water visible beyond the cliff edge with distant coastline
sheer drop-off at the edge of the rocky plateau revealing the ocean below

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a dramatic cliff edge revealing a vast ocean vista. The terrain transitions from inland rocky path to coastal overlook. The porter stops to observe the view, with snow-capped mountains now visible to the right and the open sea ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal ridge path with scattered trees

events.description: character resumes walking along the cliff ridge path
another porter in yellow gear becomes visible ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: porter continues along the cliff edge path, moving uphill on sandy terrain

notable_agents.action: fellow porter in yellow and blue gear walking ahead on the same path

entered.detail: tall thin trees with sparse foliage growing along the ridge
lighter colored sandy soil forming the cliff-top path

segments.scene_description: The porter resumes walking along the coastal ridge, with the ocean now visible to the left. The terrain becomes sandier with scattered trees lining the path. Another traveler appears ahead, also carrying cargo, as the character continues the ascent through the rocky coastal landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rugged mountain interior that gradually opens into a vast coastal vista. It begins with a porter walking steadily across a wide-open rocky landscape under a partly cloudy sky, with snow-capped peaks looming in the distance. As the character reaches a dramatic cliff edge, the inland terrain transitions into a coastal overlook, prompting a pause to observe the open sea stretching ahead. The scene then shifts as the porter resumes their journey along the ridge, where the ground becomes sandier and scattered trees line the path with the ocean now visible to the left. Finally, the camera follows the ascent through the rocky coastal landscape as another cargo-carrying traveler appears ahead on the trail.
